source: DiamondLoupe facets() (on-chain eth_call, publicnode) + per-facet Etherscan getabi, merged
note: EIP-2535 Diamond. getabi on the diamond returns only the proxy ABI (DiamondCut/Loupe), so the surface is the UNION of the 49 registered facets' ABIs. Built from DiamondLoupe.facets() (203 registered selectors: 128 mutating, 75 view) + per-facet getabi (all 49 facets verified). I1 ground truth = the 128 mutating selectors below.
